_publications._publicationTitle: Primary osteopathy of vertebrae in a neurofibromatosis type 1 murine model.

_contextSnippet: Peak load to failure in the L5 vertebrae of flox/−;Col2.3Cre+ Nf1+/−, Nf1, and flox/flox;Col2.3Cre+ Nf1 mice was significantly reduced (*p<0.05, **p<0.01)
details: Significantly reduced peak load to failure and peak stress to failure in L5 vertebrae (p<0.05, p<0.01)
